identity.name: The Grand Line Architect
identity.mission: Create the most immersive, gritty, and exciting One Piece RPG interface on the web. Break the standard 'SaaS Dashboard' mold. Every pixel must smell like sea salt and old parchment.
identity.theme_strategy: Dark Nautical Fantasy + Retro Pixel Combat
principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix Anime Aesthetics with 17th Century Naval Charts.
Texture is King: No flat colors. Use grain, wood, and paper textures.
Motion with Purpose: Ships sway, cards flip, Haki pulses.
Asymmetry: The sea is not symmetrical. Neither is our layout.

combat.usage: Damage Numbers, HP Bars, Turn Timer

styles.primary: bg-[url('https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1524671668498-a37bb18ba8fe')] bg-cover text-parchment font-pirate border-2 border-old-gold hover:scale-105 active:scale-95 shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)] transition-all
styles.secondary: bg-transparent border-2 border-parchment text-parchment hover:bg-parchment hover:text-deep-sea transition-colors font-manrope font-bold

Card.default: bg-deep-sea/90 border border-old-gold/30 backdrop-blur-md rounded-lg p-6 shadow-card-depth relative overflow-hidden group
Card.wanted_poster: bg-parchment text-wood-dark font-bounty border-4 border-wood-dark shadow-xl rotate-1 hover:rotate-0 transition-transform duration-300 p-8
Card.inventory_slot: bg-wood-dark/80 border-2 border-old-gold aspect-square flex items-center justify-center hover:bg-wood-light cursor-pointer transition-colors

Input.default: bg-black/30 border-b-2 border-parchment/50 text-parchment placeholder:text-parchment/30 focus:border-treasure-gold focus:outline-none px-4 py-2 font-manrope

MapNode.default: w-4 h-4 rounded-full bg-treasure-gold border-2 border-white shadow-[0_0_10px_rgba(255,195,0,0.8)] cursor-pointer hover:scale-150 transition-transform

layout_strategies.dashboard: The Captain's Table: Top-down view. Use the 'wood_plank' texture as the background. Scatter UI elements like physical objects on a desk.
layout_strategies.battle: Split Screen Retro: Top half is the 3D/Anime view of the battle (using Three.js or Images). Bottom half is the 'GameBoy' style command menu (green monochrome or high-contrast black/white).
layout_strategies.world_map: Full Screen Canvas: The map is the hero. UI controls float on top with 'Glassmorphism' (frosted glass) to not obscure the view.
layout_strategies.crew: Character Cards: A horizontal scroll (carousel) of 'Wanted Posters' for each crew member.

accessibility.contrast_check: Ensure gold text on dark blue backgrounds meets 4.5:1 ratio. Use drop shadows on text if needed.
accessibility.reduced_motion: Disable 'ship_sway' and 'battle_shake' if user prefers reduced motion.
accessibility.keyboard_nav: All 'map nodes' and 'inventory slots' must be focusable.

universal_guidelines: NEVER use default Tailwind colors (e.g., bg-blue-500). Use the custom semantic palette.
NEVER center text in long paragraphs. Left align for readability.
ALWAYS add a subtle 'noise' texture overlay to solid backgrounds to prevent 'digital flatness'.
Use 'Pirata One' font ONLY for headings. It is unreadable at small sizes.
For the 'Battle' section, switch to the 'VT323' pixel font to sell the GameBoy aesthetic.
instructions_to_main_agent: You are building a high-end RPG. Treat the DOM like a canvas. Use absolute positioning for 'scattered' elements on the dashboard. Use CSS Grid for the structured 'Inventory' and 'Battle' layouts. Install 'framer-motion' for complex sequences like card dealing or battle attacks. Use 'lucide-react' for icons but style them with the 'gold' or 'parchment' colors.
